Name: Create Url Misp Object
Author: admin
Description: Create a URL Object in MISP. Requires “URL” to be provided or “Use Entities“ parameter set to true.

Parameters.Description: Specify the ID or UUID of the event to which you want to add URL objects.
Specify the URL, which you want to add to the event.
Specify the port, which you want to add to the event.
Specify, when the URL was first seen. Format: 2020-12-22T13:07:32Z
Specify, when the URL was last seen. Format: 2020-12-22T13:07:32Z
Specify the domain, which you want to add to the event.
Specify the additional text, which you want to add to the event.
Specify the IP, which you want to add to the event.
Specify the Host, which you want to add to the event.
If enabled, action will use entities in order to create objects. Supported entities: URL. “Use Entities“ has priority over other parameters.

AIDescription:
### General Description
This action creates a URL object within a specified MISP (Malware Information Sharing Platform) event. It allows users to document URL-related threat intelligence by associating a URL with metadata such as ports, domains, IP addresses, and timestamps. The action can either take a single URL manually via parameters or automatically process all URL entities present in the current Google SecOps case.

### Parameters Description
| Parameter | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Event ID** | String | Yes | The ID or UUID of the MISP event where the URL object will be created. |
| **URL** | String | No | The specific URL to add to the event. This is required if 'Use Entities' is set to false. |
| **Port** | String | No | The port number associated with the URL. |
| **First seen** | String | No | The timestamp when the URL was first observed (Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ). |
| **Last seen** | String | No | The timestamp when the URL was last observed (Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ). |
| **Domain** | String | No | The domain associated with the URL. |
| **Text** | String | No | Additional descriptive text or comments for the URL object. |
| **IP** | String | No | The IP address associated with the URL. |
| **Host** | String | No | The hostname associated with the URL. |
| **Use Entities** | Boolean | No | If enabled, the action ignores the 'URL' parameter and instead creates objects for all URL entities found in the case. |

### Additional Notes
- **Dependency**: Either the 'URL' parameter must be populated or 'Use Entities' must be set to true for the action to execute successfully.
- **Priority**: The 'Use Entities' parameter takes priority over the manual 'URL' input if both are provided.

### Flow Description
1. **Initialization**: The action retrieves connection settings and validates the provided MISP Event ID to ensure the target event exists.
2. **Data Collection**: Depending on the configuration, the action identifies the target URL(s) from the manual 'URL' parameter or by filtering the case's entities for URL types.
3. **Object Creation**: For each identified URL, the action sends a request to the MISP API to create a new URL object using the provided metadata (port, domain, IP, etc.).
4. **Reporting**: The action returns the raw JSON of the created objects and updates the Google SecOps case wall with a data table summarizing the new URL attributes.
